content.en:
Ye Tian was ready to disarm the Dark King's copy body, and was ready to copy the Star Sand Beast.

Even if it is 100,000 times faster, it will take more than a month to use the ability to copy the body.

Judging from the current situation, if another month passes, I am afraid that the Earth World's Star Sand has already been found, and there may not be much left.

100,000 times the time acceleration is also the limit acceleration time under the rules, but there is no absolute, as long as there are time-like taboo strange things can break this limit, it can be completely accelerated millions of times the time or even more time.

But the time forbidden strange thing is so precious and rare, even if someone gets this forbidden strange thing, it will not be used to waste acceleration time.

Over the years, Ye Tian has obtained countless forbidden strange things, and there is really a time strange object of the high forbidden strange object level, which can be used to complete a time acceleration, which can be accelerated by about 2 million times.

According to this calculation, after 10,000 years, the outside world has only spent more than a day.

Delaying for more than a day is nothing, after all, the Earth World is comparable to the size of an Ancient Realm, and it will take a long time for the Half-Step Domain Ancestors to explore the entire Earth World when their divine sense is useless.

Ye Tian searched separately from Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue, and took the opportunity to let the Dark King come to Ye Tian's side.

Under the urging of Ye Tianyi's thoughts, the copy body of the Dark King dissipated, and the forbidden armor, sky-killing spear and other weapons on his body fell one by one, and all the resources and treasures obtained before also fell and were put away by Ye Tian.

Immediately, Ye Tian began to copy the body of the Star Sand Beast.

Wow!

A massive stellar sandbeast appeared, like an enlarged gerbil and clad in thick black scale armor.

Ye Tian manipulated the body of the Xingchen Sand Beast, and suddenly there was a special sense in his body, there was something in a distant place that made it feel disgusted, in this emotion, the Xingchen Sand Rats were reluctant to go there, it was an instinct.

But Ye Tian is not really a star gerbil, so naturally he will not act according to this instinct.

"That place should have all things in the stars!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Instantly, he manipulated the body of the Star Sand Beast and fled past.

Soon, he came here, and sure enough, he saw the stars and sands of all things.

Ye Tian didn't let the Star Sand Beast go to fetch the Star Sand of All Things, because the Star Sand Beast didn't have a copy talent on it, so it couldn't probe the surrounding situation, in case there happened to be a half-step Domain Ancestor or other Dao Ancestor nearby, then this Star Sand Beast's body would be dead.

He didn't have a second forbidden time artifact to speed things up, so he couldn't take any chances.

The mission of the Star Sand Beast is to lock the location of the Star Sand, while the main body follows behind to probe the situation, and if there is no danger, it will take the Star Sand.

Not long after the Xingchen Sand Beast's body left, Ye Tian's body came here, probed the surroundings with his copying talent, and immediately took away this grain of Xingchen Sand.

That's it.

The Star Sand Beast continued to search for the Star Sand of all things in the earth world, and Ye Tian's body continued to collect the Star Sand of all things, and with the cooperation of each other, a large amount of Star Sand of all things was harvested.

Time passed day by day, and the Star Sand of all things in the earth world became less and less, until 40 days passed, and the Star Sand Beast looked for a long time and did not perceive the existence of all things Star Sand.

Maybe there are still all things in the earth world, but it may be in a too remote place, and Ye Tian is too lazy to wait.

This time, he obtained a total of 872 grains of Star Sand.

He didn't know how many Ten Thousand Star Sand the Half-Step Domain Ancestors had obtained, but there was definitely not as much as the Ten Thousand Star Sand he had obtained.

Subsequently, Ye Tian joined his son and daughter.

"Father, I just got a grain of Star Sand!"

Ye Xingchen sighed.

And Ye Xingyue puffed out his mouth and said, "I didn't find any of them!"

"If you can't find it, you can't find it, let's go to the Golden World, there are already many Dao Ancestors who have gone to that world, if you go late, you won't be able to get anything!" Ye Tian urged.

"Hmm!"

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue nodded again and again.

Rushing!!!

The three of them left the Earth World through a void crack, and after shuttling through the void cracks, they finally came to the gold world.

As soon as he came to the Golden World, battles broke out everywhere, and even the half-step domain ancestors were fighting.

And the place where Ye Tian, Ye Xingchen, and Ye Xingyue landed happened to be a battle point, and about four or five Supreme Dao Ancestors were snatching a mineral vein, fighting wildly with each other.

When Ye Tian descended, an attack also bombarded him.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian blocked it casually, and then said coldly.

"It's the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor!"

Those few Supreme Dao Ancestors were startled and hurriedly fled, not daring to fight here again, otherwise they would die.

After these Supreme Dao Ancestors left, Ye Tian and the three of them looked at this vein.

"Father, it's the Black Striped Celestial Stone Vein!"

Ye Xingchen recognized it and said.

"Well, it is indeed a black-veined celestial stone, containing a trace of forbidden attributes, although it is not qualified to create forbidden weapons, but it can create Dao weapons containing forbidden attributes, such a vein is enough to create tens of thousands of top-notch Dao weapons, no wonder those supreme Dao ancestors fought for such a vein!" Ye Tian said in a low voice.

Immediately, the three of them began to collect this ore vein, and it took a little time to completely separate the ore vein from the gold world and put it into the inner world.

Ye Tian understood that the biggest treasures in the Golden World should be the rare veins, and the black-veined Heavenly Stone veins belonged to the relatively low-end veins, which could not arouse the greed of the Half-Step Domain Ancestors and the Invincible Dao Ancestors.

Those Invincible Dao Ancestors and Half-Step Domain Ancestors were definitely competing for more precious ore veins, and they simply didn't have time to collect these low-value ore veins.

Of course, it can also be said that those Invincible Dao Ancestors and Half-Step Domain Ancestors have swelled.

But there is no way, if it is the outside world, there is a black-veined celestial stone vein, and the invincible Dao ancestors will be crazy to snatch it, but in this golden world, the black-veined celestial stone vein is really ordinary!

Ye Tian and his children continued to search for ore veins, and soon found several ore veins, the value of which was lower than the black vein of Tianshi, but no one mined it, so Ye Tian asked his son and daughter to mine and look for low-value ore veins nearby.

And he put on the equipment of the Dark King, and became the Dark King to fight for the precious vein.

Soon.

He came to a battlefield where the invincible Dao Ancestors were snatching the ore veins, including the Invincible Dao Ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain.

For example, the three Dao Ancestors, namely the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor, the Jade Ding Dao Ancestor, and the Golden Buddha Dao Ancestor.

Ye Tian looked at the ore veins that had been blasted into pieces, and his pupils suddenly shrank.

"This is the !!!! of the indestructible black gold vein"
